ddls:
CREATE TABLE "timing_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the timing parameter */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the timing parameter */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operating condition for the timing parameter */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the timing parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the timing parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the timing parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the timing parameter */,
  "ic_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC model the parameter is associated with */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  "load_capacitance" REAL /* Load capacitance for the parameter */,
  "operating_temperature" TEXT /* Operating temperature range for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_ic_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("ic_model_id") REFERENCES ic_models ("ic_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating condition */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum operating temperature */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum operating temperature */,
  "min_voltage" REAL /* Minimum operating voltage */,
  "max_voltage" REAL /* Maximum operating voltage */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the condition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the condition */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the unit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the unit */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ic_models" (
  "ic_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IC model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the IC model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the IC model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the IC model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the IC model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the IC model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the IC model was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the IC model */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the IC model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ic_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter */,
  "ic_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the timing parameter */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the timing parameter version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_ic_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("ic_model_id") REFERENCES ic_models ("ic_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the timing parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the timing parameter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "ic_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC model the report is for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_ic_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("ic_model_id") REFERENCES ic_models ("ic_model_id")
)
